LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CELLO & MAUDRU CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT CONFIRMED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO NAPA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PAY THE COSTS OF THE TRANSFER. SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT A PROPER VENUE FOR THIS CASE. PER CCP 398, DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO HAVE THE CASE TRANSFERRED TO NAPA COUNTY. THERE IS NO MOTION BEFORE THE COURT OTHER THAN DEFENDANT'S MOTION BASED SOLELY ON THIS LAWSUIT HAVING BEEN FILED IN THE WRONG COUNTY, SO PLAINTIFF'S CONVENIENCE ARGUMENTS ARE NOT GERMANE. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CELLO & MAUDRU CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is granted. The case is transferred to Napa County. Plaintiff is required to pay the costs of the transfer. San Francisco is not a proper venue for this case. Per CCP 398, defendant is entitled to have the case transferred to Napa County. There is no motion before the court other than defendant's motion based solely on this lawsuit having been filed in the wrong county, so plaintiff's convenience arguments are not germane. The prevailing party is submit a proposed order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
